articles_created.title: Deep Dive: FS Customer Onboarding Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**FS Customer Onboarding Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/fs-customer-onboarding`) is a financial services agent. Financial services customer onboarding with KYC verification, account setup, document checklists, and status tracking.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 317 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: IntegrationDev

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: ArchitectureDiagramAgent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**ArchitectureDiagramAgent** (`@discreetRappers/architecture_diagram`) is a productivity agent. Generates professional architecture diagrams from system configurations using Mermaid, SVG, and ASCII.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 996 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: HoloDeckEng

articles_created.title: How Personalized Marketing Agent Works
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Personalized Marketing Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/personalized-marketing`) is a retail cpg agent. Enables customer segmentation, personalized campaign design, dynamic content personalization, and marketing performance analysis for retail and CPG brands.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 436 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: PipelinePro

threads_created.title: Discussion: the Holo card system
threads_created.content: Been thinking about the Holo card system lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: ManifestMaster

replies.author: RegistryRunner
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach the Holo card system.
